Metadata.title: Swiparr – Discover what to watch next
Metadata.tagline: Swipe on what to watch next, by yourself or together.
Metadata.loginDescription: Login to Swiparr to start swiping on what to watch next, by yourself or together.
Metadata.joinDescription: You've been invited to join a session with code: {join}.

Login.providerMismatchDesc: The server provider configuration has changed. You have been logged out.
Login.guestLendingDisabled: This session does not allow guest lending
Login.serverMismatch: Server configuration mismatch between session and user
Login.hostOnlySettings: Only the host can modify session settings

Settings.cannotUndo: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your likes and any sessions you have created.

Session.notInSessionDesc: Create or join a session get started.
Session.noMatchesDesc: Start swiping together and see matches here.
Session.guestSessionDesc: You are currently joined as a guest. Some features are unavailable due to you lending the session host's account.
Session.guestLendingTipDesc: Allow others to join your session without an account by enabling Guest Lending in Settings.

Deck.emptyDesc: You're all swiped up. Refresh to fetch more, or adjust the filters.
Deck.hideWatchedDesc: Only show items you haven't seen yet

ErrorDisplay.pageNotFoundDesc: We couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or deleted.
ErrorDisplay.systemErrorDesc: Something went wrong on our end. We're working on fixing it.
ErrorDisplay.noConnectionDesc: You are currently offline. Check your internet connection and try again.
ErrorDisplay.appErrorDescFallback: An unexpected client-side error occurred and the application crashed.
ErrorDisplay.persistPrefix: If this problem persists, please try clearing your browser cache or submit an issue

SecureCopy.title: Manual copy required
SecureCopy.description: Automatic copy and sharing is disabled because Swiparr is not running in a secure context (HTTPS).

LoginUniversal.joinPrompt: Enter a display name to join the session
LoginUniversal.startPrompt: Enter a name to start swiping
LoginUniversal.tmdbPrompt: Configure TMDB and enter a name

AdminInit.title: Admin Privileges
AdminInit.description: You are the first user and have been set as the administrator.

AuthSession.plexPinMsg: Enter this code in the <link>Plex app</link> or click the button to open Plex directly.
AuthSession.quickConnectMsg: Go to <bold>Settings → Quick Connect</bold> on your logged-in device to authorize.
AuthSession.plexProviderPrompt: Sign in to link with your Plex account
AuthSession.experimentalDesc: Certain features may not work as expected.
AuthSession.guestPromptWithCode: Enter a display name and code to continue
AuthSession.guestPromptNoCode: Enter a display name to continue
AuthSession.guestJoinLogMode: Joining as a guest lets you join a session without an account.

UserGuide.swipeRightDesc: Add to your likes. A match is created if other participants also swipe right.
UserGuide.swipeLeftDesc: Discard the current title and ignore it. The card won't show up again.
UserGuide.rewindDesc: Revert the last swipe action and put the last card in front.
UserGuide.detailsDesc: Expand the card to view synopsis, trailers, and cast info.
UserGuide.filterInfo: Filter by Genre, Year, or Rating. Toggle Watchlist/Favorites sync in settings (Jellyfin only).
UserGuide.setupDesc: Create a session and share the generated URL with other users.
UserGuide.matchUnanimousDesc: Requires all participants to like the title.
UserGuide.matchMajorityDesc: Matches when two or more participants agree.
UserGuide.limitsDesc: Configure maximum likes or matches per session to expedite selection.
UserGuide.randomSelectionInfo: Use the <bold>Random Selection</bold> button on the Matches screen to pick one title from your current matches.
UserGuide.guestDesc: Enable this to allow users without accounts to join your session.
UserGuide.guestPoint1: Guests connect via proxy (no direct account access).
UserGuide.guestPoint2: Likes are isolated to the specific session.
UserGuide.guestPoint3: Temporary access expires when the session is closed.

SettingsAbout.title: About
SettingsAbout.onLatest: You are on the latest version

SettingsAdmin.noAdminDesc1: Claim the admin role to manage global application settings.
SettingsAdmin.noAdminDesc2: Only one user can be admin.

SettingsGeneral.title: General
SettingsGeneral.themeDesc: Switch between light and dark mode
SettingsGeneral.guestLendingDialogDesc1: Allows people to join your session as guests without needing their own account.
SettingsGeneral.guestLendingDialogDesc2: They will use your connection to fetch movies and images for the duration of the session.
SettingsGeneral.guestLendingDesc: Let others join without an account
SettingsGeneral.sessionUpdated: Guest lending updated for current session

SettingsStreaming.title: Streaming
SettingsStreaming.servicesDesc: Select which services you have access to
SettingsStreaming.noServicesRegion: No providers found for this region
SettingsStreaming.atLeastOneService: At least one streaming service must be selected

Likes.noLikesDesc: You haven't liked any movies yet. Get started by swiping your first movie.

SessionSettings.title: Session Settings
SessionSettings.atLeastTwoDesc: A match occurs as soon as at least two members have liked the same movie.
SessionSettings.unanimousDesc: Every single member in the session must like the movie for it to be a match.
SessionSettings.restrictionsDesc: Try these settings to speed up or tweak your session experience.
SessionSettings.maxMatches: Max total matches for the session
